Variables.Name: InOpacity
Variables.Description: Input opacity which will be scaled by the result of the fade.

Variables.Name: FadeDistance
Variables.Description: World space distance over which the fade should take place.

Variables.Name: OpacityDefault
Variables.Description: Opacity which will be scaled by the result of the fade.  This is used when InOpacity is unconnected.

Variables.Name: FadeDistanceDefault
Variables.Description: World space distance over which the fade should take place.  This is used when FadeDistance is unconnected.
